ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "element_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the element (e.g., H, He) */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the element (e.g., Hydrogen, Helium) */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the element */,
  "atomic_mass" REAL /* Atomic mass of the element */,
  "electronic_configuration" TEXT /* Electronic configuration of the element (e.g., 1s^2 2s^2 2p^6) */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the element in the periodic table */,
  "group" INTEGER /* Group of the element in the periodic table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shells" (
  "shell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shell */,
  "principal_quantum_number" INTEGER /* Principal quantum number (n) of the shell */,
  "max_electrons" INTEGER /* Maximum number of electrons that can be accommodated in the shell */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shell was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shell was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the shell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shells_principal_quantum_number FOREIGN KEY ("principal_quantum_number") REFERENCES elements ("atomic_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "subshells" (
  "subshell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subshell */,
  "shell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shell the subshell belongs to */,
  "azimuthal_quantum_number" INTEGER /* Azimuthal quantum number (l) of the subshell */,
  "subshell_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the subshell (e.g., s, p, d, f) */,
  "max_electrons" INTEGER /* Maximum number of electrons that can be accommodated in the subshell */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subshell was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subshell was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subshell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subshell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subshells_shell_id FOREIGN KEY ("shell_id") REFERENCES shells ("shell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orbitals" (
  "orbital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each orbital */,
  "subshell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subshell the orbital belongs to */,
  "magnetic_quantum_number" INTEGER /* Magnetic quantum number (m) of the orbital */,
  "max_electrons" INTEGER /* Maximum number of electrons that can be accommodated in the orbital */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the orbital was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the orbital was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the orbital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("orbital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orbitals_subshell_id FOREIGN KEY ("subshell_id") REFERENCES subshells ("subshell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electrons" (
  "electron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electron */,
  "orbital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the orbital the electron occupies */,
  "spin_quantum_number" TEXT /* Spin quantum number (msms) of the electron */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the electron was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the electron was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or notes about the electron */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("electron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electrons_orbital_id FOREIGN KEY ("orbital_id") REFERENCES orbitals ("orbital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_subshells" (
  "element_subshell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element-subshell combination */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the element */,
  "subshell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subshell */,
  "num_electrons" INTEGER /* Number of electrons in the subshell for the element */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element-subshell relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element-subshell relationship was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or notes about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_subshell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_subshells_subshell_id FOREIGN KEY ("subshell_id") REFERENCES subshells ("subshell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_subshells_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_shells" (
  "element_shell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element-shell combination */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the element */,
  "shell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shell */,
  "num_electrons" INTEGER /* Number of electrons in the shell for the element */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element-shell relationship was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element-shell relationship was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or notes about the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_shell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_shells_shell_id FOREIGN KEY ("shell_id") REFERENCES shells ("shell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_shells_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the element */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the element was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isotopes" (
  "isotope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isotope */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the element */,
  "mass_number" INTEGER /* Mass number of the isotope */,
  "abundance" REAL /* Natural abundance of the isotope */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the isotope was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the isotope was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or notes about the isotope */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isotope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isotopes_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the element */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theoretical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theoretical model */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the element */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the theoretical model */,
  "model_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the theoretical model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the theoretical model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theoretical_models_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the element */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Electron configuration of the element at a specific date */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description or notes about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_element_configurations_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the element */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)
